trigger: A quick local gameplay review found the Guardians preview timing, pace, and sprite look were not close enough to Galaxian for the first reference quick peek.

sourceEvidence.notes: This pass was guided by committed contact sheets and runtime gates, not by automated sprite extraction or frame-level motion tracking.

visuals: Moved flagship, escort, scout, and player pixel rows toward smaller classic Galaxian proportions.
Darkened the board backdrop and reduced decorative guide-line prominence.
timingAndPacing: Moved first scout dive from 2.2s to 3.1s.
Moved first flagship/escort dive from 6.4s to 8.45s.
Reduced formation drift amplitude and frequency.
Slowed dive vertical speed, acceleration, sway frequency, side drift, enemy shots, and shot density.
Tightened the rack layout to better match the compact upper-field reference footprint.

remainingGaps: Sprites are still hand-authored approximations rather than extracted reference sprites.
Dive paths are still runtime-shaped approximations rather than frame-tracked motion paths.
Attract mission text and score advance table are still not implemented as runtime systems.
Audio remains internally shaped rather than matched against Galaxian waveform features.
